purpose: COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks is a service that acts as a notification gateway for loan-selling related events in the CRB Cos Lending platform. It receives notifications about loan sale status changes, batch purchases, and other lending events, and publishes them to a central hooks system to trigger downstream processes.

apis.purpose: Health check endpoint for the service
Publishes various types of loan selling notifications to the hooks system

dataEntities.name: LoanSaleStatusChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in loan sale status with loan details, investor, and financial amounts

dataEntities.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
dataEntities.description: Represents a completed batch purchase with totals for principal, interest, fees and count of loans

dataEntities.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged
dataEntities.description: Represents a true-up volume fee charged for a specific month and year

dataEntities.name: InvestorChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in the investor associated with a loan

dataEntities.name: LoanTypeChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in the loan type for a specific loan

dataEntities.name: OverdueLoansAlert
dataEntities.description: Represents alerts for overdue loans with counts and sum amounts

messagingPatterns.name: LoanSaleStatusUpdated
messagingPatterns.description: Event published when a loan sale status changes

messagingPatterns.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
messagingPatterns.description: Event published when a batch purchase is completed

messagingPatterns.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged
messagingPatterns.description: Event published when a true-up volume fee is charged

messagingPatterns.name: LoanTypeChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Event published when a loan type is changed

messagingPatterns.name: InvestorChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Event published when an investor is changed for a loan

messagingPatterns.name: OverdueLoansAlert
messagingPatterns.description: Event published when overdue loans are detected

findings.title: Missing error handling for failed event publishing
findings.description: The NotificationPublisher class does not have robust error handling for failures when publishing events. If the NServiceBus message publishing fails, there's no retry mechanism or error tracking, which could lead to lost notifications. Implement proper error handling with retries and dead-letter queue mechanism.

findings.title: Authentication configuration needs safeguards
findings.description: The authentication configuration in appsettings.Development.json indicates that OAuth keys are 'taken from aws secrets manager' but there's no validation to ensure these values are actually present before the application starts, which could lead to unauthenticated access if misconfigured.
